integration.name: QuickBooks Online
integration.source_of_truth: QuickBooks for accounting transactions; SandFest platform for operational status and fulfillment

sponsor.notes: Sponsor tier, package, and benefit fulfillment stay in SandFest. Invoice/payment state comes from QuickBooks.

vendor.notes: Vendor approval, booth, load-in, permits, and inspection remain operational records.

donation_distribution.notes: Use for nonprofit and scholarship impact reporting. Do not infer restricted-fund allocations without finance review.

raffle.notes: Raffle entrant data may be sensitive; store only what is necessary for reconciliation and compliance.
